Name: Asgard Taping Set (TF-DVKN-31Q3)
Description:
Asgard Taping Set (TF-DVKN-31Q3) provides a comprehensive, high-performance solution for contractors focused on speed and precision in drywall finishing. This integrated system streamlines joint taping and corner finishing, ensuring consistent, paint-ready results across high-volume projects while minimizing operator fatigue.

Each component is engineered for durability in demanding job site environments. The set includes specialized tools for rapid tape application, efficient compound loading, and precise corner finishing, allowing for seamless transitions between tasks and improved overall workflow efficiency.

Features:

  • Mighty HAMMER Automatic Taper: Delivers uniform tape application and controlled compound flow for increased daily output on flat seams and internal corners.
  • High-Efficiency Loading Pump: Reduces downtime by enabling quick, clean filling of tools, paired with a gooseneck for seamless compound transfer.
  • Precision Corner Finishing: Includes a 3-inch angle head and corner roller to ensure perfectly embedded tape and smooth, feathered edges.
  • Ergonomic Reach: Features two extendable handles to provide necessary leverage for high ceilings and varied wall configurations.

Name: Asgard Extendable Support Handle (XH-AD)
Description:
Asgard Extendable Support Handle (XH-AD) provides a versatile, contractor-grade solution for managing various drywall finishing tools. This telescopic handle is engineered to streamline workflows by allowing seamless transitions between corner rollers, angle boxes, nail spotters, and angle heads without the need for multiple handle systems. Its lightweight aluminum build ensures durability while reducing operator fatigue during extended use on ceilings and walls.

The handle features a specialized D-shaped fitting that locks securely into compatible tools, effectively eliminating rotation for precise, consistent results. With an ergonomic 1.25-inch diameter profile, it offers a comfortable grip that enhances control and minimizes hand strain. This tool is backed by a 5-year limited warranty and is fully supported by the TapeTech service network.

Features:

  • Telescopic Reach: Adjusts smoothly from 43 to 77 inches to accommodate varying ceiling heights and wall angles.
  • Anti-Rotation Interface: Integrated D-shaped fitting ensures a rigid, non-slip connection with finishing tools.
  • Ergonomic Profile: Optimized 1.25-inch diameter grip reduces wrist and hand fatigue during repetitive tasks.
  • Lightweight Construction: High-strength aluminum frame provides a balance of maneuverability and long-term durability.

Name: Trowels
Description:
Premium Finishing Trowels

Introducing Columbia Trowels – engineered for professionals who demand superior flexibility, strength, and control on every job. Built with hardened stainless steel blades and ground edges with round corners, these trowels deliver smooth, consistent results across a wide range of drywall and finishing tasks.

From the ultra-responsive .3 Super-Flex to the robust .7 Pro-Flex Gold, Columbia offers a full line of trowels in sizes from 12″ to 18″, each designed for a specific level of flex and feel. The ultra-light aluminum high-alloy bar ensures exceptional balance, while the ergonomic, replaceable cork handle provides comfort during long hours of use.

100% made in Poland, Columbia Trowels are the professional’s choice for quality that lasts.

      Ergonomic & Replaceable Cork Handle

Name: Columbia X Graco PowerFill 3.5 Loading Pump
Description:
Note: This product is not eligible for rebates, wholesale pricing, or discounts and is only available in North America.

Columbia Tools has partnered with Graco to bring you a Columbia Tools branded version of their already successful cordless powered loading pump for Columbia customers. The Columbia X Graco PowerFill is designed to fill all automatic taping and finishing tools with ease. The PowerFill system completely eliminates the need for manual pumping, allowing you to fill with just the push of a button.

Say Goodbye to Hand Pumping. The single-button pumping mechanism reduces fatigue and minimizes the risk of injury associated with manual pumps. With a flow rate of up to 3.5 gpm, you can fill tools lightning-fast, and with the capability to pump up to 55 gallons on a single battery charge, you’ll have all-day performance. Plus, it’s programmable to automatically refill tools with Precision Fill.

Bucket not included.

Features

  • SmartControl Pro with Programmable Precision Fill: Automatically refills your tools to your preset level.
  • One Button Pumping: Eliminates fatigue and potential injuries.
  • Hands-Free Continuous Run Mode: Ideal for transferring large quantities of material or self-cleaning.
  • Hi-Rise Fill Tube: Allows you to fill tools while standing upright, protecting your back and reducing fatigue. The tube rotates to position the outlet where needed, including above buckets to save space and contain drips.
  • Includes Filler Attachments: Designed for angle and flat boxes.

Powerstroke Pump

  • 4X Life vs. Manual Pumps: Built for exceptional durability.
  • Fastest Tool Fills: Pumps up to 3.5 gpm for efficient filling.
  • Maintenance Free: Tool-less access for easy cleaning of the pump cylinder, inlet, and filter.

ProConnect Pump and Removable Powerhead

  • No-Tools Pump and Powerhead Removal: Easily detach the powerhead for storage and quick cleaning.

Powered by DEWALT®

  • Compatible with any 20V MAX Lithium-Ion DEWALT Battery: Pumps up to 55 gallons per charge for reliable all-day use.

Adjustable Bucket Stabilizer

  • No-Tools Adjustment: Fits most buckets and containers.
  • Oversized Foot Bracket and Stabilizer Arm: Keeps the pump secure and stable.
  • Convertible Outlet: Change from right to left-sided pump outlet in minutes

Specifications

  • Version: 26B418
  • Max GPM (lpm): 3.5 (13.2)
  • Weight Lbs (Kg): 17 (7.7)
  • Pump: PowerStroke
  • Power/Battery: (1) DEWALT 20V MAX* COMPACT 2.0 ah Lithium-Ion Batteries and (1) Charger
  • Pump Outlet: Hi-Rise Fill Tube w/Box Filler
  • Precision Fill: Yes
  • Inlet Filter: Tool-less, 10 Mesh (1)
  • Adjustable Flow: Yes
  • Fits Container: Adjustable up to 5 (7-15″ Bucket Height Range)

Individual Part Numbers:

Description:
Columbia offers the widest range of high quality, high capacity finishing boxes in the world. From our 5.5″ Fat Boy to our 12″, they are all star performers. Well-built and fine-tuned to offer great flat joints for years. We have been told for years that our boxes are the smoothest finishing and easiest to push, and now they’re also the highest capacity on the market. We are very proud to get this feedback and will make sure that every Fat Boy box we make exceeds your expectations.

FEATURES:

  • Available in 5.5″, 8″, 10″, 12″ sizes
  • Bead wheel protects axel from wear while running box on bead
  • Hand made from U.S. billet aluminum and steel components
  • Machined in our state of the art facility in Canada

Name: Fat Boy Smoothing Blades
Description:
Fat Boy Smoothing Blades

Available Now

Columbia is proud to launch the Fat Boy Smoothing Blades—built for comfort, precision, and performance.

With a lightweight, rubberized ergonomic grip to reduce slipping, the Fat Boy delivers smooth, even finishes with control. Its replaceable stainless steel blade offers long-term durability, while the new Fat Boy Smoothing Blade Claw expands your finishing options.

Two new Fiberglass Telescopic Extension Poles debut alongside the blades. Their snap lock system connects seamlessly with the Fat Boy Adapter and also works with our 2K Handle Mud Rollers, giving unmatched versatility.

When used by Hand or handles—the Fat Boy brings efficiency and comfort to every pass.

Key Features:

  • Replaceable  Stainless Blade: Long-lasting and ultra-durable.

    Lightweight & Ergonomic Grip: Designed for comfort, control, and less fatigue.

    Rounded Anti-Trace Edges: Minimize lines and imperfections.

    New Fiberglass Telescopic Poles with Snap Lock: Extend your reach and work seamlessly with Fat Boy Blades and 2K Handle Mud Rollers.

    Available Sizes & Part #:

    Fat Boy Smoothing Blades

    Fat Boy Smoothing Blade 7” – FSB7

    Fat Boy Smoothing Blade 10” – FSB10

    Fat Boy Smoothing Blade 12” – FSB12

    Fat Boy Smoothing Blade 40” – FSB40

    Fat Boy Smoothing Blade 48” – FSB48

Name: Finishing Hawks
Description:
Finishing Hawk

Introducing the Columbia Finishing Hawk—crafted for professional drywall finishers who demand precision, comfort, and control. Designed for smooth gliding while working with a trowel or knife, this 13” hawk is built to elevate your finishing workflow.

Made from high-quality aluminum with milled grooves for enhanced grip and material control, it features round corners for safety and smoother handling. The ergonomic, replaceable cork handle and rubber cover offer superior comfort and reduced fatigue during long days on the job.

Proudly 100% made in Poland, the Columbia Finishing Hawk is a trusted tool for flawless finishing.

Available Size:

  • 13”

    Key Features:

    • Round Corners

      High-Quality Aluminum Plate

      Milled Grooves

      Ergonomic & Replaceable Cork Handle

      Rubber Cover

      100% Made in Poland

      Individual Part Numbers:

      13-H-S – 13″ X 13″ HAWK

Name: Flat Box Handle
Description:
The Columbia 180 degree Grip Flat Box Handle is a 1 and 1/4″ thick design pipe. These handles are durable and extremely long lasting, all while maintaining the comfort and ease of use that you’re used to with the Columbia brand of tools. The Columbia Flat Box Handle is not only the lightest on the market, but also the strongest, ensuring a long life.

The 180 degree Grip allows for continuous breaking over the entire range of motion – a complete 180 degrees. This ensures that you never lose your grip when adjusting your position. Extra strong aluminum design for years of rugged use.

Features:

  • 180 degree grip allows for continuous breaking
  • Handmade from U.S. billet aluminum and
    steel components
  • Comes in 3ft, 42″, 4ft, 5ft and 6ft
  • Machined in our state of the art facility in Canada
  • Hard anodized tube
  • Comfort grips
  • Thickest, strongest and lightest handle on the market

Name: Inside Track Conversion Kits
Description:
Columbia offers the widest range of high quality Flat Boxes in the world. From our 5.5” specialty box to our 14”, they are all star performers. Introducing the Columbia Mud Pan—the first in our new line of premium hand tools, designed for professionals who demand durability, comfort, and performance. Name: Columbia Predator Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper
Description:
The Predator is the world’s first Carbon Fiber Taper and the benefits that come with this are endless. The Columbia Taper is a precision built tool that has been perfected over 38 years, but now it is also significantly lighter than all other tapers on the market and dent proof. This tool will tape flats and angles effortlessly year after year. From less drag in the corners to our easy to remove cap for cleaning, this tool will not let you down. Stainless steel side plates and cable drum and creaser arms offer a lifetime of corrosion resistance. The Patent Pending Pump Action cutting sleeve gives the operator a smoother glide over teflon bearings, superb grip and the pull ring is great for higher ceilings. The Predator maintains it’s stable temperature and remains warm to the touch. Every taper comes standard with an adjustable brake and quick release for tape changing. The Titanium pull rod is just another detail that adds style and edge to this innovative, unique taper. If you are serious about taping and care how a taper feels and performs this is the one for you.

FEATURES:

  • Handmade from Carbon Fiber and steel components
  • Titanium pull rod
  • Adjustable Brake
  • Quick release for tape changing
  • Reduced Drag system for corners
  • Stainless steel side plates, creaser arms and cable drum
  • Quick release cap
  • NEW Very smooth Patent Pending Pump Action cutting system with a roller chain
  • 53″ in length
  • Machined in our state of the art factory in Canada

Name: Columbia Sawed Off Mini PREDATOR Automatic Taper
Description: Columbia Taping Tools introduces the world's first Mini Carbon Fiber Taper, The Predator "Sawed Off" Mini. Unlike other taper bodies made mostly from aluminum, the Predator's Carbon Fiber construction, makes this precision-engineered tool 20% lighter and more durable then any standard mini taper on the market. Another unique benefit of this Dent Proof construction, is that Carbon Fiber maintains temperature stability, meaning this taper will remain warm to the touch. The 6 wheel cutting sleeve has been updated in favor of teflon sliders which gives the operator a smoother glide and better grip. Now, changing the sliders out is simple field maintenance and can be installed with a standard screwdriver in minutes as opposed to half an hour or more. The pull ring is ideal for higher ceilings. The Predator will tape flats and angles effortlessly with less drag in the corners. The quick release cap makes cleaning a breeze and the stainless steel side plates, cable drum, and creaser arms offer a lifetime of corrosion resistance. With style, functionality, and durability the Predator from Columbia takes the -Evolution of Taping- to a whole new level. Predator "Sawed Off" Mini is perfect for taping drywall in small rooms and closets when a full size taper is too cumbersome.

It is our solution to Columbia Customers looking for a lighter/more affordable option. The body profile remains the same as the Tomahawk’s but is made from high quality plastic rather than billet aluminium.

One of the standout features of the Sabre Smoothing Blades is their remarkable weight—around 60% lighter than the Tomahawk Smoothing Blades—making them easier to maneuvre and control. Additionally, they offer a competitive price point costing around 40% less allowing you to choose the right tool for your needs without compromise.

Whether you prefer manual use or want to enhance your reach with a Sabre Extension pole (using the Sabre Claw adapter), the Sabre Smoothing Blades deliver perfectly even usage and smoothness across the entire length of the blade. Their ergonomic and lightweight design ensures that you can work efficiently without fatigue.

  • 10 sizes: 7″, 10″, 12″, 14″, 16″, 18″, 24″, 32″, 40″ & 48″
  • Works with by hand or with the Sabre Claw Adapter (SBC) adaptor for the Sabre Pole (SBP)
  • Hardened Stainless Steel Blade: Durable and ultra-abrasion resistant for long-lasting performance.
  • Rounded Anti-Trace Edges: Designed to minimise marks and imperfections.
  • High-Performance Bi-Flex Technology: Featuring a PVC plate for enhanced flexibility and control.

They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. TapeTech compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. The shafts of our dedicated roller frames are a full 5/16” thick, providing the strongest frame in the industry – a must for this heavy-duty application. The roller and roller frames quickly and easily attach to our TapeTech model CROLLHAN2 extendable support handle (44” – 79”) to make quick work of most walls and ceilings without the need for stilts or scaffolds. Comfortable Handle: The TapeTech Roller frames feature a comfortable, two-component over molded handle that provides comfortable handling and positive grip, even when wet. Highest Quality: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are manufactured in Europe exclusively for TapeTech, using the highest quality reticulated polypropylene nap for great results and long life. Highest Capacity: When matched with a TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller, applies nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers and frames. Highest Coverage: The unique design and manufacturing of TapeTech premium joint compound rollers releases more compound from the nap and onto the surface, providing the highest coverage rate per roller load. Extended Reach: Easily attaches to TapeTech CROLLHAN2 extendable handle to reach most common walls and ceilings without stilts or scaffolds. With super secure attachment and lightweight but robust construction, you’ll quickly knock out any wall coverage or skimming job. Ideal for Skimming: The TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for quickly applying large amounts of compound over patches, butt joints or entire surfaces. The perfect set up for skimming with TapeTech premium finishing knives. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish.TapeTech compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. The shafts of our dedicated roller frames are a full 5/16” thick, providing the strongest frame in the industry – a must for this heavy-duty application. The roller and roller frames quickly and easily attach to our TapeTech model CROLLHAN2 extendable support handle (44” – 79”) to make quick work of most walls and ceilings without the need for stilts or scaffolds. Key Features:Robust Design: Features a full 5/16” thick frame design – stronger than smaller ¼” thick frames – and the most robust joint compound roller frame on the market.Comfortable Handle: The TapeTech Roller frames feature a comfortable, two-component over molded handle that provides comfortable handling and positive grip, even when wet.Highest Quality: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are manufactured in Europe exclusively for TapeTech, using the highest quality reticulated polypropylene nap for great results and long life.Highest Capacity: When matched with a TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller, applies nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers and frames.Highest Coverage: The unique design and manufacturing of TapeTech premium joint compound rollers releases more compound from the nap and onto the surface, providing the highest coverage rate per roller load.Extended Reach: Easily attaches to TapeTech CROLLHAN2 extendable handle to reach most common walls and ceilings without stilts or scaffolds. With super secure attachment and lightweight but robust construction, you’ll quickly knock out any wall coverage or skimming job.Ideal for Skimming: The TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for quickly applying large amounts of compound over patches, butt joints or entire surfaces. The perfect set up for skimming with TapeTech premium finishing knives.Available in 4 sizes: TapeTech premium joint compound roller frames are available in 4-inch, 9-inch and 12-inch sizes plus an integrated 2-inch model that includes the roller and frame together.
Short description: TapeTech 9" Roller Cage CCAGE09 TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings

Name: Corner Finisher Adapter
Description: The Corner Finisher Adapter (CFA-TT) attaches directly to any TapeTech Support Handle. Once the adapter is in place, any TapeTech tool with a socket-style connection—such as Corner Finishers or Corner Flushers —securely mounts onto the adapter. This creates a smooth, pivoting ball-and-socket action for controlled movement. Key Points: Installs onto any TapeTech Support Handle, including: XHTT – Extension Handle FHTT – Fiberglass Handle FHTT-CC – Closet Crusher Fiberglass Handle Provides the ball portion of the ball-and-socket joint. Designed for tools that feature the socket-style receiver found on TapeTech tools like the Corner Finishers or Corner Fluser. Enables smooth articulation and precise corner finishing while maintaining a stable connection. Why It’s Essential: With the CFA-TT, your handle becomes the universal base for all TapeTech socket-style corner tools—making it easy to switch tools, adapt to different spaces, and maintain consistent finishing performance.

Name: Premium Compound Roller
Description: TapeTech 4" Premium Compound Roller CROLL04 TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. Key Features: Highest Quality: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are manufactured in Europe exclusively for TapeTech, using the highest quality reticulated polypropylene nap for great results and long life. Highest Capacity: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers feature an 18mm nap - nearly 50% thicker than other brands with ½” nap – allowing you to apply nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers. Highest Coverage: The unique design and manufacturing of TapeTech premium joint compound rollers releases more compound from the nap and onto the surface, providing the highest coverage rate per roller load. Robust Frame Design: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames (sold separately). Our frames are a full 5/16” thick – stronger than smaller ¼” thick frames on the market. Extended Reach: Easily reach most common walls and ceilings using the TapeTech CROLLHAN2 extendable handle (sold separately). With super secure attachment and lightweight but robust construction, you’ll quickly knock out any wall coverage or skimming job. Ideal for Skimming: The TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for quickly applying large amounts of compound over patches, butt joints or entire surfaces. The perfect set up for skimming with TapeTech premium finishing knives.
Short description: TapeTech 4" Premium Compound Roller CROLL04 TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls

Name: Bazooka Continuous Flow Pump
Description: The Bazooka Continuous Flow Pump was designed in conjunction with Graco specifically to pump joint compound for high production drywall finishing applications. The Endurance Pump, MaxPower Motor and Advantage Drive System combine to create the most rugged and reliable pump on the market. The internal hopper filter maximizes material usage by allowing joint compound collected during the wipe down process to be re-used without fear of debris entering the pump. The 25 gallon hopper can be used as a tool wash station and includes an air tight lid so compound can be preserved for next day use. With the optional CTFIL, standard ATF tools can be filled while the continuous flow tools are in use. Also Available: CTEPMP: CFS Pump - Europe (230V / 50 Hz). Available through European Distributors and Dealers only. CTAPMP: CFS Pump - Australia (230V / 50 Hz) with 242005 adapter. Available through Australian and New Zealand Distributors and Dealers only. CTUPMP: CFS Pump - UK (110V). Available through UK Distributors and Dealers only.

Name: EasyClean® Nail Spotter
Description: TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter The TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter is a must-have tool for drywall finishing. It fills the depressions left by nail or screw heads during drywall installation. The Nail Spotter's easy clean box design helps fill these depressions and remove extra compound at the same time. This makes the drywall finishing process faster and easier. Key Features A key feature of the TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter is its hardened steel skid plate. This plate lets the Nail Spotter move smoothly along the wall. It also protects the stainless steel blade from damage caused by nail or screw heads that are not fully set below the drywall surface. Consequently, this feature helps the tool last longer, making it a smart buy for drywall professionals. Handle Compatibility The Nail Spotter works with the XHTT Extension handle and the FHTT fiberglass handle. These handles are sold separately. They give extra reach and control, making it easier to work on high or hard-to-reach areas without ladders or scaffolding. The extension handle is great for big projects, while the fiberglass handle is a light yet strong option. User-Friendly Design The TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter is designed to be easy to use. The easy clean box design makes cleaning simple and quick. This is very useful for busy contractors who need to keep their tools in good condition without losing time. Benefits: - Efficient Drywall Finishing: Fills depressions caused by nail or screw heads and removes extra joint compound in one pass. - Durable Construction: Hardened steel skid plate protects the blade, ensuring long-lasting performance. - Enhanced Reach and Control: Compatible with XHTT Extension and FHTT fiberglass handles, available separately. - User-Friendly Design: Easy clean box design makes maintenance simple. For more information on using the TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter and other drywall finishing tools, visit our Drywall Tool Guide. To see how the Nail Spotter works in real-world settings, check out our demonstration video and customer testimonials on our YouTube channel. With these features, the TapeTech EasyClean® Nail Spotter helps you get a professional finish with less effort. Its durable build and easy-to-use design make it an essential tool for any drywall project. Specifications - Material: Stainless steel blade, hardened steel skid plate - Handles: Compatible with XHTT Extension handle and FHTT fiberglass handle (sold separately) - Weight: Lightweight for easy use and handling For buying options and to explore our full range of drywall finishing tools, visit our product catalog.

Name: Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper
Description: The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper: Revolutionizing Drywall Finishing &nbsp; The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is an innovative tool designed to streamline the drywall finishing process. When connected to the Continuous Flow Pump (CTPMP), this advanced taper simultaneously applies drywall tape and the correct amount of joint compound to all types of drywall joints. This combination of efficiency and precision makes it an indispensable tool for professional contractors. Key Features of the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper &nbsp; One of the standout features of the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is its inline handle with dual trigger, which enhances control and ease of use. Weighing just 7 pounds, it is lightweight enough to be maneuvered effortlessly, reducing user fatigue during extended use. The taper's design includes a creaser wheel, which ensures a perfect finish every time by embedding the tape securely into the joint compound. &nbsp; Additionally, the tool-less hose connection makes setup and disassembly quick and straightforward, saving valuable time on the job. For added convenience, the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper can be paired with the CTVLV for wireless, radio frequency (RF) control, allowing the user to manage the flow of joint compound from the pump to the taper with ease. &nbsp; Versatile Application &nbsp; The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is versatile, capable of handling various types of drywall joints with precision: - Butt Joints and Flat Joints: Whether you're working on walls or ceilings, the taper applies the joint compound and tape seamlessly, ensuring a smooth and professional finish. - Internal Corners: The taper is designed to efficiently handle internal corners on walls and ceilings, making it a comprehensive solution for all your drywall finishing needs. Advantages of Using the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper &nbsp; - Increased Efficiency: By applying both tape and joint compound simultaneously, the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper significantly speeds up the drywall finishing process. This increased efficiency allows for more work to be completed in less time, enhancing productivity. - Consistent Quality: The precise application of joint compound and tape ensures a consistent, high-quality finish on every joint. This consistency reduces the need for additional touch-ups and sanding, saving both time and materials. - Ease of Use: The lightweight design and ergonomic inline handle make the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper easy to maneuver, even in tight spaces. The dual trigger system provides greater control over the application process, resulting in a more accurate and professional finish. - Quick Setup: The tool-less hose connection and wireless RF control simplify the setup and operation of the taper, allowing users to focus on the task at hand without worrying about complex equipment adjustments. &nbsp; Conclusion &nbsp; The Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper is an essential tool for anyone involved in drywall installation and finishing. Its advanced features, combined with its lightweight and ergonomic design, make it a valuable addition to any toolkit. Whether you are working on large-scale projects or smaller tasks, the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper will help you achieve a flawless finish with minimal effort. Embrace the future of drywall finishing with the Bazooka Continuous Flow Taper and experience unparalleled efficiency and quality in your work.

Name: Extension Handle
Description: TapeTech is the first company to introduce an interchangeable handle system that allows one support handle to be used with every tool. Whether you use standard, fixed length fiberglass handles or aluminum extension support handles, you’ll need just one base handle. The base handle for the fiberglass system is model FHTT. The base handle for the extension handle system is model XHTT. The base handle fits the corner roller, corner applicator and nail spotter without any adapters. The heavy duty, easy-to-change adapter (CFA-TT) connect the handles to the corner finishers. And the optimal diameter makes TapeTech handles the most ergonomic in the industry. Both base handles feature a D-shaped fitting that securely positions the handle in the Corner Applicator and positively prevents the tool from rotating during use. Note: If you use your current Nail Spotters with the handle system you will need to mount the handle in the back holes of the tabs on the Nail Spotter.

Name: Corner Flushers
Description: TapeTech Corner Flushers make quick work of wiping or finishing inside corners. Direct flushers are used to apply joint compound to internal corners. Indirect flushers simply smooth compound that has been applied by another tool. TapeTech flushers work as both a direct and indirect flusher. That means you don’t have to decide which model to get, only which sizes fit your needs.
